message:
fix: suppress large_futures in wezterm.rs and use clone_from in plan.rs

wezterm.rs:
- Add #![allow(clippy::large_futures)] — same rationale as vendored mux
  client/pool: deeply nested async call chains produce inherently large
  futures
- Revert unnecessary double Box::pin wrapping now that the lint is
  suppressed

plan.rs:
- Use clone_from() instead of assignment from clone() for
  report_error_code in commit and compensation phases (clippy
  assigning_clones)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
